ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "borough_description" TEXT /* Description of the borough */,
  "borough_population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Number of the block */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough the block belongs to */,
  "block_description" TEXT /* Description of the block */,
  "block_area_sqft" INTEGER /* Area of the block in square feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owner_types" (
  "owner_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner type */,
  "owner_type_name" TEXT /* Description of the type of owner */,
  "owner_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the owner type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "owner_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the owner */,
  "owner_address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "owner_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "owner_email" TEXT /* Email of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Block number of the property */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "property_value" INTEGER /* Value of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner related to this ownership */,
  "ownership_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership was recorded */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., sale, inheritance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_history_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year the tax was paid */,
  "tax_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of tax paid */,
  "tax_paid_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_taxes_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "assessment_year" INTEGER /* Year the assessment was made */,
  "assessment_value" INTEGER /* Value of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_assessments_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_permits" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permit record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "permit_type" TEXT /* Type of permit (e.g., construction, renovation) */,
  "permit_date" TEXT /* Date when the permit was issued */,
  "permit_status" TEXT /* Status of the permit (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_permits_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
